name: power-platform
description: Microsoft Power Platform specialist team for Claude Code — 9 expert agents (power-fx-engineer, flow-engineer, dataverse-architect, model-driven-engineer, solution-alm-engineer, power-platform-admin, pcf-developer, copilot-studio-engineer, power-pages-engineer) plus 9 veteran-level skills imported from Daniel Kerridge's claude-code-power-platform-skills (MIT). Skills include dataverse-web-api (17 reference docs), dataverse-plugins, dataverse-web-resources, pcf-controls, power-apps-code-apps, plan-with-team, code-review, visual-qa, and record-screen. Designed for professional makers who want real engineering judgment, not click-by-click tutorials.
